title: Stargazers Spot a Galaxy's First Breath
story: Peering through powerful telescopes, astronomers at the University of California made an incredible discovery on January 6, 1987. For the first time ever, they witnessed the birth of a galaxy! This groundbreaking observation opened a window into the universe's earliest moments, helping us understand how the countless galaxies we see today came to be.

story: Scientists cracked a 2,000-year-old mystery on January 6, 2023. They found that ancient Roman concrete is stronger than today's! The secret? A hot mixing technique using quicklime. title: Slaves Speak Up for Freedom
story: Courage filled the air as slaves in Massachusetts took a bold step. In 1773, they wrote a petition asking for their freedom. On January 6, these brave individuals presented their request to the state legislature. They hoped to change their lives and end the unfair practice of slavery. Their actions helped spark important conversations about equality and human rights.
activity_question: What did the slaves in Massachusetts do in 1773?
activity_choices: They wrote a petition asking for freedom
They learned to read and write
activity_answer: They wrote a petition asking for freedom
follow_up_question: Why do you think it was brave for slaves to ask for freedom?

title: Brave Major Saves Jersey from Invasion
story: Cannons boomed as Major Francis Peirson led his troops into battle on January 6, 1781. French forces had invaded the island of Jersey, hoping to capture it. But Peirson and his men fought bravely, pushing back the attackers. Their courage and quick thinking saved Jersey, keeping it safe from French control.
activity_question: Who led the troops that defeated the French invaders?
bonus_fact: Jersey is a small island in the English Channel, not the U.S. state of New Jersey!

title: Brave Voices Unite Against Slavery
story: Determined to end a terrible practice, a group of courageous people gathered in Boston. They formed the New England Anti-Slavery Society on January 6, 1832. These brave souls spoke out against slavery when many others stayed silent. Their goal? To convince everyone that all people deserve to be free, no matter the color of their skin.
activity_question: What was the name of the group formed in Boston?
follow_up_question: Why do you think it was important for people to speak out against slavery?
